stages.concept:
# Unit 096: 부가 의문문 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **부가 의문문**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> She is happy, **isn't she**?
> 그녀는 행복하지, 그렇지 않니?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 부가 의문문은 문장 끝에 **짧은 의문문**을 붙여서 확인하는 표현이에요. **"~이지, 그렇지?"**라는 뜻이에요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 규칙: **긍정문 → 부정 부가, 부정문 → 긍정 부가**

> He is a doctor, **isn't he**? (긍정 → 부정)
> She can't swim, **can she**? (부정 → 긍정)

👩‍🏫 선생님: be동사가 있으면 be동사로, 일반동사면 do/does/did로, 조동사면 조동사로!

> You like pizza, **don't you**?
> They went home, **didn't they**?
> He can drive, **can't he**?
> She has finished, **hasn't she**?

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 부가 의문문을 고르세요.**
"You like pizza, (       )?"
1. aren't you
2. do you
3. don't you ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요! 주어와 일반동사의 현재형(like)이 쓰였으므로 do동사를 쓰고, 앞이 긍정이니 뒤는 부정(don't)으로 만들어야 해요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: 주의할 점도 알아볼까요?

> Let's go, **shall we**? (Let's → shall we)
> Open the door, **will you**? (명령문 → will you)
> I am right, **aren't I**? (I am → aren't I)

🧑‍🎓 학생: 긍정이면 부정 꼬리, 부정이면 긍정 꼬리! Let's는 shall we, 명령문은 will you! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 096: 부가 의문문 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 빈칸에 알맞은 부가 의문문을 쓰시오.
Mr. Kim doesn't know you, (     )
> **정답** does he

---

**02.** She is a good student, ?
> **정답** isn't she

---

**03.** They went to the park, ?
> **정답** didn't they

---

**04.** You can swim, ?
> **정답** can't you

---

**05.** He won't come, ?
> **정답** will he

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She is happy, is she?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is she → isn't she

---

**07.** They don't like pizza, don't they?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** don't they → do they

---

**08.** He can't drive, can he not?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** can he not → can he

---

**09.** You went to school, don't you?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** don't you → didn't you

---

**10.** She was tired, wasn't her?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** wasn't her → wasn't she

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그는 학생이야, 그렇지 않니?
He is a student, (     )
> **정답** isn't he

---

**12.** 그녀는 오지 않을 거야, 그렇지?
She won't come, (     )
> **정답** will she

---

**13.** 너는 수영할 수 있어, 그렇지 않니?
You can swim, (     )
> **정답** can't you

---

**14.** 그들은 축구를 좋아해, 그렇지 않니?
They like soccer, (     )
> **정답** don't they

---

**15.** 그는 어제 학교에 갔어, 그렇지 않니?
He went to school yesterday, (     )
> **정답** didn't he

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 예쁘지, 그렇지 않니?
She pretty is isn't she
> **정답** She / is / pretty / isn't / she

---

**17.** 그들은 오지 않았어, 그렇지?
didn't They come did they
> **정답** They / didn't / come / did / they

---

**18.** 너는 배가 고프지, 그렇지 않니?
are You hungry aren't you
> **정답** You / are / hungry / aren't / you

---

**19.** 그는 영어를 못 해, 그렇지?
can't He speak English can he
> **정답** He / can't / speak / English / can / he

---

**20.** 날씨가 좋지, 그렇지 않니?
The weather nice is isn't it
> **정답** The / weather / is / nice / isn't / it
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 096: 부가 의문문 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 부가의문문을 고르시오.
Tom plays the piano, _____ ___ (     )
does he
isn't he
doesn't he
don't he
> **정답** doesn't he

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 부가의문문을 고르시오.
Amy is hungry, _____ ___ (     )
does she
isn't she
is she
doesn't she
> **정답** isn't she

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 부가의문문을 고르시오.
Let's climb the mountain, _____ ___ (     )
shall we
do we
don't we
will we
> **정답** shall we

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 부가의문문을 고르시오.
Arrive at school by 8 o'clock, _____ ___ (     )
will you
shall we
do you
don't you
> **정답** will you

---

**05.** 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
He cut down the tree, ______ he?
She was teaching English, _______ she?
He went to school, ______ he?
She wore pants, _______ she?
> **정답** She was teaching English, _______ she?

---

**06.** 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
They take a class, _______ they?
You are kind and nice, _______ you?
You are a middle school student, _______
you?
We are at the garden, _______ we?
> **정답** They take a class, _______ they?

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy is playing a game, doesn't she?
We can swim, can't we?
They are not students, are they?
He writes novels, doesn't he?
> **정답** Amy is playing a game, doesn't she?

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
This book is interesting, isn't this?
You can't ski, can you?
The puppies ate, didn't they?
Amy and Tom go to the library, don't they?
> **정답** This book is interesting, isn't this?

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
This refrigerator works well, don't it?
They don't know that, do they?
These movies are interesting, are they?
She's a great dancer, isn't she?
> **정답** They don't know that, do they?, She's a great
dancer, isn't she?

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom and Amy take a walk, didn't they?
Your brother listens to music, don't you?
Let's have some biscuits, shall we?
She's not good at basketball, isn't she?
> **정답** Let's have some biscuits, shall we?

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Don't make noise in the library, _______ _____?
You won't watch TV, _______ _____?
will you
do you
don't you
won't you
> **정답** will you

---

**12.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 내일 쇼핑할 거야, 그렇지 않니?
She will go shopping tomorrow, won't she?
She will go shopping tomorrow, will she?
She will go shopping tomorrow, won't her?
She goes shopping tomorrow, doesn't her?
> **정답** She will go shopping tomorrow, won't she?

---

**13.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이 소설은 재미있지 않아, 그렇지?
This novel is not interesting, is this?
This novel is not interesting, is it?
This novel is not interesting, isn't it?
This novel is not interesting, is this novel?
> **정답** This novel is not interesting, is it?

---

**14.** 주어진 문장을 부가의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을
고르시오.
They won't take the subway next week.
They won't take the subway next week. will
them?
They won't take the subway next week. won't
they?
They won't take the subway next week, will
they?
They won't take the subway next week. do
they?
> **정답** They won't take the subway next week, will they?

---

**15.** 주어진 문장을 부가의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을
고르시오.
Don't cook in this mountain.
Don't cook in this mountain, will you?
Don't cook in this mountain, won't you?
Don't cook in this mountain, do you?
Don't cook in this mountain, shall you?
> **정답** Don't cook in this mountain, will you?

---

**16.** 주어진 문장을 부가의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을
고르시오.
Let's go to the cafe this afternoon.
Let's go to the cafe this afternoon, shall we?
Let's go to the cafe this afternoon, will you?
Let's go to the cafe this afternoon, don't we?
Let's go to the cafe this afternoon, won't you?
> **정답** Let's go to the cafe this afternoon, shall we?

---

**17.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그와 그녀는 박물관에 갔어, 그렇지 않니?
He and she visited the museum, did he and
she?
He and she visited the museum, did they?
He and she visited the museum, didn't they?
He and she visited the museum, didn't he and
she?
> **정답** He and she visited the museum, didn't they?

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
You ordered a steak, do you?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** do → didn't

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Tom and you will join the
reading club, will he?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** will he? → won't you

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
These boxes are heavy, aren 't
these?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** these? → they
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 096 부가 의문문중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 문장을 부가의문문으로 만들 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
The store doesn't open on Sundays, 
?
정답 does, it

---

**02.** 다음 문장을 부가의문문으로 만들 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
They will take an English test tomorrow, 
?
정답 won't, they

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 부가의문문으로 만들 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
Keep to the right,  (     )   (     ) (     )
정답 will, you

---

**04.** 다음 문장을 부가의문문으로 만들 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
Let's draw flowers on the wall,  (     )   (     ) (     )
정답 shall, we

---

**05.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
A: This chair is comfortable,  (     )   (     ) (     )
B: Yes,  (     )   (     ) .
정답 isn't, it, it, is

---

**06.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
A: You can't play piano,  (     )   (     ) (     )
B: No,  (     )   (     ) . But I can play violin.
정답 can, you, I, can't

---

**07.** 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
A: The teams don't play in this game, 
?
B: Yes,  (     )   (     ) .
정답 do, they, they, do

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
경기규칙을 어기지 마라, 알겠지?
[break] [the rules] (     ) (     )
[shall] [will] [Don't]
[of the game,] [you]
정답 Don't / break / the rules / of the game, / will / you / ?

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 메시지를 보낼 수 없어, 그렇지?
[He] [he] (     ) (     ) [can't]
[messages,] [can] [does]
[send]
정답 He / can't / send / messages, / can / he / ?

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그의 여동생은 키가 크지 않아, 그렇지?
[isn't] [does] [is] [sister]
[she] [tall,] (     ) (     ) [His]
정답 His / sister / isn't / tall, / is / she / ?

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 096: 부가 의문문 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 부가의문문을 고르시오.
Tom plays the guitar, _____ ___ ? does he isn't he doesn't he don't he
> 정답: doesn't he

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 부가의문문을 고르시오.
Amy is thirsty, _____ ___ ? does she isn't she is she doesn't she
> 정답: isn't she

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 부가의문문을 고르시오.
Let's go to the park, _____ ___ ? shall we do we don't we will we
> 정답: shall we

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 부가의문문을 고르시오.
Arrive at the airport by 7 o'clock, _____ ___ ? will you shall we do you don't you
> 정답: will you

---

**05.** 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
He painted the fence, ______ he?
She was reading a novel, _______ she?
He went to the library, ______ he?
She wore a dress, _______ she?
> 정답: She was reading a novel, _______ she?

---

**06.** 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
They ride a bike, _______ they?
You are smart and funny, _______ you?
You are a high school student, _______ you?
We are in the classroom, _______ we?
> 정답: They ride a bike, _______ they?

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom is playing a game, doesn't he?
We can dance, can't we?
They are not teachers, are they?
She writes poems, doesn't she?
> 정답: Tom is playing a game, doesn't he?

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
This movie is exciting, isn't this?
You can't skate, can you?
The kittens ate, didn't they?
Tom and Amy go to the gym, don't they?
> 정답: This movie is exciting, isn't this?

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
This oven works well, don't it?
They don't know that, do they?
These shows are funny, are they?
She's a great singer, isn't she?
> 정답: They don't know that, do they?, She's a great

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom and Amy take a walk, didn't they?
Your sister listens to music, don't you?
Let's have some cookies, shall we?
She's not good at tennis, isn't she?
> 정답: Let's have some cookies, shall we?

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Don't make noise in the hall, _______ _____?
You won't eat sweets, _______ _____? will you do you don't you won't you
> 정답: will you

---

**12.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 내일 여행할 거야, 그렇지 않니?
She will go traveling tomorrow, won't she?
She will go traveling tomorrow, will she?
She will go traveling tomorrow, won't her?
She goes traveling tomorrow, doesn't her?
> 정답: She will go traveling tomorrow, won't she?

---

**13.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이 영화는 지루하지 않아, 그렇지?
This movie is not boring, is this?
This movie is not boring, is it?
This movie is not boring, isn't it?
This movie is not boring, is this movie?
> 정답: This movie is not boring, is it?

---

**14.** 주어진 문장을 부가의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
They won't take the bus next week.
They won't take the bus next week. will them?
They won't take the bus next week. won't they?
They won't take the bus next week, will they?
They won't take the bus next week. do they?
> 정답: They won't take the bus next week, will they?

---

**15.** 주어진 문장을 부가의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
Don't swim in this lake.
Don't swim in this lake, will you?
Don't swim in this lake, won't you?
Don't swim in this lake, do you?
Don't swim in this lake, shall you?
> 정답: Don't swim in this lake, will you?

---

**16.** 주어진 문장을 부가의문문으로 바르게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
Let's go to the library this afternoon.
Let's go to the library this afternoon, shall we?
Let's go to the library this afternoon, will you?
Let's go to the library this afternoon, don't we?
Let's go to the library this afternoon, won't you?
> 정답: Let's go to the library this afternoon, shall we?

---

**17.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그와 그녀는 미술관에 갔어, 그렇지 않니?
He and she visited the gallery, did he and she?
He and she visited the gallery, did they?
He and she visited the gallery, didn't they?
He and she visited the gallery, didn't he and she?
> 정답: He and she visited the gallery, didn't they?

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. You  ordered  a  pizza,  do  you? 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: do → didn't

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Amy  and  you  will  join  the book  club,  will  he? 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: will he? → won't you

---
